title: What will be the new canon of the series
display_title: What will be the new canon of the series
wikitext:
[]: What will be the new canon of the series Post by tian2992 » Tue Apr 29, 2008 12:12 am I think that Anno wanted Rebuild separated from the series, from production to style. The issue is that probably Rebuild will be far more simplified than the TV series and Manga, because of the nature of what we have already saw at Rebuild and the complexity of the actual Canon. For most old fans, I believe that the series will still be canon, what do you think.

[]: Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue Apr 29, 2008 1:55 am http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=134837&highlight=&sid=33e79ff96837fe74ea3689d14210456a Rebuild discussions go there. http://www.evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=166170&sid=a2b627cb2c91f578ce7e67c553ea354e Hope this helps as well.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Apr 29, 2008 9:20 am Thanks, for the thread links, BZ. Since both the threads in question have been resurrected, this one gets locked down.
